title: artemisia furcata subsp. tacomensis
intro: Artemisia furcata subsp. tacomensis, also known as Tacom sagewort, is a subspecies of the furcata sagebrush plant, native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Artemisia furcata subsp. tacomensis can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
